description: An Industrial-Organizational Psychologist has administered the computerized BFI-44 (Big Five Inventory) to job applicants. Process the raw trial-by-trial data at ~/pebl/data/bfi_raw_data.csv using the scoring key at ~/pebl/lab/bfi_key.json to generate a trait report. Exclude participants for speeding (median reaction time rt_ms < 500 ms) or straight-lining (standard deviation of raw responses < 0.25). For valid participants, apply reverse scoring (6 - original_response) to items specified in the key and calculate the mean for each Big Five trait. Determine the overall group mean for each trait across all valid participants. Export the results to ~/pebl/analysis/bfi_
